description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a metallic silver slide and frame, complemented by a wooden grip panel featuring a visible emblem or medallion. The slide is elongated and features engraved markings on the left side, adding a touch of detail and realism. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with a textured surface for improved handling and a warm brown color that contrasts with the rest of the gun. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is long and extends slightly beyond the slide, with a smooth, unadorned finish. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A silver semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel, engraved slide, and a brown textured wooden grip featuring an emblem.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the engraved slide, wooden grip with emblem, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the slide and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the grip texture, trigger guard, and the clean lines of the slide and frame.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the rounded trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of brown wood with a smooth, contoured shape that fits comfortably in the hand. It features a textured pattern for enhanced grip and an embedded circular emblem or medallion, likely representing a manufacturer or brand. The grip panels are secured with visible screws and have a subtle ergonomic swell for palm support.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or undercuts, and its robust construction suggests durability. The design is conventional, lacking squared-off edges or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, extending slightly beyond the slide with a smooth, unthreaded profile. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the exterior finish matches the matte silver of the slide. The barrel appears solid and unadorned.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features engraved markings, including what appears to be a signature or stylized text. The engravings are subtle but visible, adding a decorative and possibly identifying element to the firearm. No other prominent markings or serial numbers are visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests, and the base appears to be made of the same material as the grip or frame.
